Accident to OY-NMX in Kalundborg (EKKL) on 8-10-2023

27-11-2023
Havari/Accident 2023-506 OY-NMX Svævefly/Glider Kalundborg (EKKL) 2023

A non-updated situational awareness of a driver led to a collision between a car and a glider

2023-506 (Danish)

Accident Investigation Board Denmark

Jaettevej 50A, 1. sal, mf.

DK-4100 Ringsted

Phone: +45 33 14 70 80

E-mail: aib@aib.dk
